This diagnostic approach offers a generalizable, data-driven metric for identifying vibrationally gated pathways in complex astrochemical networks, providing a theoretical basis for refining kinetic models of planetary and interstellar plasmas

AI.tldr: 基于混沌诊断框架与绝热规范势（AGP）和随机矩阵理论（RMT），以木星大气中的H₃⁺和H₅⁺为模型系统，揭示了过渡态作为动力学瓶颈可抑制量子混沌并增强隧穿概率，同时引入AGP斜率定义的脆弱性指数量化特定振动模式如何重新引入混沌并抑制反应性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于巨行星电离层（ionosphere）中离子-分子反应网络的化学演化，特别是通过质子转移链驱动大气组成的超冷环境（ultracold environments）中反应速率的理论建模。
AI.data: 本研究中使用的数据来源于基于多参考电子结构理论、绝热规范势（Adiabatic Gauge Potentials, AGP）和随机矩阵理论（Random Matrix Theory, RMT）的数值模拟，并以H₃⁺及质子束缚团簇H₅⁺的形成为代表模型系统。
AI.method: 核心分析方法包括基于多参考电子结构理论、绝热规范势（Adiabatic Gauge Potentials, AGP）和随机矩阵理论（Random Matrix Theory, RMT）的混沌诊断框架，并引入基于AGP斜率的脆弱性指数。
AI.result: 采用绝热量规势（AGP）和随机矩阵理论（RMT）的混沌诊断框架，揭示了过渡态作为动力学瓶颈时量子混沌显著抑制，从而增强隧穿概率，并提出基于AGP斜率的脆弱性指数来量化特定振动模式对混沌和反应性的影响。

title: Quantum-information diagnostics of cosmological perturbations with nontrivial sound speed in inflation
summary: In this work, we systematically investigate the quantum-information diagnostics of cosmological perturbations with a nontrivial sound speed, utilizing a normalized open two-mode squeezed-state framework. Rather than introducing new observables, our analysis focuses on how a modified sound speed dynamically reshapes the Schrödinger evolution of the squeezing parameters ($r_k$ and $φ_k$). We demonstrate how these dynamical changes are inherited by the reduced density matrix of the observable sector. By employing a sound-speed-resonance parametrization, we derive and evaluate the purity, von Neumann entropy, Rényi entropies, and logarithmic negativity. To overcome the intrinsic multiscale stiffness of the post-inflationary equations, we introduce a bounded variable $x = \tanh r_k$ as a partial regularization, which enables reliable numerical simulations exclusively within the inflationary regime. Our numerical results reveal that a nontrivial sound speed significantly suppresses the purity of the reduced state, indicating enhanced effective mixedness. Simultaneously, it strongly amplifies and modulates both the entropic and entanglement diagnostics. More precisely, a nontrivial sound speed postpones the onset of classicality by modulating the decoherence process. Ultimately, we show that a nontrivial sound speed leaves distinct and identifiable quantum-information signatures within the entanglement structure of the early universe.

AI.tldr: 系统研究了具有非平凡声速的宇宙学微扰的量子信息诊断，利用归一化开放双模压缩态框架，发现非平凡声速显著抑制了约化态的纯度，增强了熵与纠缠诊断，并推迟了经典性的出现。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于早期宇宙原初扰动在非平凡声速下的量子信息表征，探讨其如何通过修改挤压参数动力学影响宇宙学扰动的纯度和纠缠结构。
AI.data: 研究使用了基于归一化开放双模压缩态框架的理论推导，并利用边界变量 $x = \tanh r_k$ 进行部分正则化后，仅在暴胀时期（inflationary regime）内进行的数值模拟。
AI.method: 采用归一化开放双模压缩态框架，并引入有界变量 x = tanh r_k 作为部分正则化手段以克服数值模拟中的多尺度刚度。
AI.result: 非平凡声速会显著降低约化态的纯度（增强有效混合性），同时强烈放大并调制熵和纠缠诊断信号，从而通过调节退相干过程推迟经典性的出现，并在早期宇宙的纠缠结构中留下独特的量子信息特征。

title: Geometry, Not Calorimetry, Drives the Radio/Infrared/Gamma-Ray Correlation
summary: We investigate whether the observed radio-infrared-$γ$-ray correlation in star-forming galaxies is a geometric effect rather than a signature of local cosmic-ray (CR) calorimetry. Using the GALPROP framework, we generate synthetic observations for external viewers from a grid of 3D Milky Way models with varied CR source, gas, interstellar radiation, and magnetic field distributions, all normalised to reproduce local CR data. We find that a tight, quasi-linear correlation arises naturally from line-of-sight integration through the extended, radially-structured disc, even when local calorimetry is absent. The correlation's properties depend strongly on viewing geometry, preserving its form under moderate inclination but breaking down in edge-on views where galactic components are stratified. We conclude that the correlation is primarily an emergent property of geometric projection, not local physics. This implies that its scatter is likely not random noise but a diagnostic of underlying galactic structure and viewing angle.

AI.tldr: 通过几何投影效应而非局域宇宙线量热学，解释了恒星形成星系中观测到的射电-红外-伽马射线关联，并指出该关联的离散度可诊断星系结构和视角。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是天体物理学中星系尺度上射电、红外与伽马射线波段之间观测到的关联性是否反映了局域宇宙线能量损失过程，还是主要由观测几何效应主导。
AI.data: GALPROP框架生成的银河系三维模型网格，其参数包括宇宙射线源、气体、星际辐射场和磁场分布，并均以重现局部宇宙射线数据为归一化标准。
AI.method: 采用GALPROP框架生成基于三维银河系模型网格的合成观测，通过改变宇宙线源、气体、星际辐射和磁场分布（均以本地宇宙线数据归一化），并利用视线积分方法分析几何投影效应。
AI.result: 射电-红外-伽马射线相关性主要源于视线积分穿过延展的、具有径向结构的盘面所产生的几何投影效应，而非局部宇宙线量热计（calorimetry）的物理特征。

title: Accelerating scaling solutions from dark matter particle creation
comment: ~17 pages including the bibliography, 7 captioned figures, 3 tables (placed in the appendix); to appear in Phys. Lett. B
summary: This article opens new window to obtain accelerating scaling attractors without any need of dark energy. We study cosmological dynamics in a two-fluid system where pressureless dark matter (DM) undergoes adiabatic particle creation and exchanges energy with a barotropic fluid. Considering six widely used interaction prescriptions, we formulate the corresponding autonomous systems in a compact phase space and perform a unified dynamical analysis. We find that accelerating scaling attractors, namely late-time states where both fluids coexist with fixed energy fractions, arise only when the interaction is controlled by the DM density and energy flows from DM to the second fluid. Such attractors appear in the global and local DM-based interactions, and in the global mixed case, but are entirely absent when the interaction depends on the second fluid or on local mixed terms, which instead drive the universe to a DM-dominated accelerating phase. These results clarify the unique conditions under which matter creation can mimic dark-energy-like behaviour without introducing a dark-energy component.

AI.tldr: 通过分析无压暗物质与重子流体的六种相互作用模型，发现仅当相互作用由暗物质密度主导且能量从暗物质流向第二流体时，才会出现无需暗能量的加速缩放吸引子。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是在无需引入暗能量（dark energy）的情况下，通过物质创生机制解释宇宙晚期加速膨胀的动力学理论。
AI.data: 数据来源为非观测性，基于理论构建的两流体系统，其中无压暗物质发生绝热粒子创生并与一流体交换能量，采用六种广为使用的相互作用形式进行数值模拟。
AI.method: 核心分析方法为紧致相空间中的统一动力学分析，物理模型是包含绝热粒子创生的无压暗物质与一种正压流体的双流体系统。
AI.result: 在无暗能量组分的情况下，仅当相互作用由暗物质（DM）密度控制且能量从暗物质流向第二种流体时，加速标度吸引子（accelerating scaling attractors）才会出现。

title: Turbulent infall onto class 0 disks as cause of CAI brief condensation episode in the solar system
summary: Calcium-aluminum-rich inclusions (CAIs) in carbonaceous chondritic meteorites are the oldest relics in the solar system. Notably, their radiogenic age feature a brief (100 kyr) condensation episode. In contrast, the reservoirs of the short-lived isotopes in CAIs, presumably supernovae or asymptotic giant stars, pollutes star-forming regions in giant molecular cloud complexes (GMC) over much longer (Myr) duration. Through a series of numerical simulations, we show here the possibility that, within an extended region (2$\sim$3 AU), nearly all ``pre-solar'' CAI-loaded grains in the infall clouds were sublimated and re-condensed during the early ($ \lesssim 10^5$ yr) infall and formation of class-0 disks. We adopt a set of initial conditions from a previous hydrodynamic simulation of the collapse of GMC and the formation of young stellar clusters. We analyze the evolution of the disk's thermal distribution and dynamical structure resulting from the interaction between circumstellar disks and infalling gas. Our follow-up simulations, with much higher resolution, show significant and rapid changes in the disk orientation and morphology due to the dynamic infall of external streamers. Warps and global spiral density waves commonly appear. They lead to intense dissipation which heats the gas to sufficiently high temperature to sublimate prior-generation CAIs. This solid-to-gas phase transition is followed by subsequent cooling and re-condensation. The CAI contained in the meteorites today could be the relics of the last episode of major infall onto class 0 disks.

AI.tldr: 通过数值模拟发现，在类0盘（class-0 disk）形成早期的吸积过程中，富钙铝包体（CAI）颗粒会在延伸区域（2-3天文单位）内经历升华与再凝聚，这可能是现今陨石中CAI的最后一次主要吸积事件遗迹。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索太阳系最古老固体物质（富钙铝包体，CAIs）在早期恒星吸积盘形成过程中的热历史与来源。
AI.data: 本研究的模拟初始条件取自先前对巨分子云（GMC）坍缩及年轻星团形成过程的流体动力学模拟。
AI.method: 通过一系列数值模拟分析原恒星盘与下落气体相互作用导致的热演化和动力学结构变迁，采用高分辨率模拟追踪外部流丝下落的动态过程。
AI.result: 在早期（约10万年）的星云塌缩和0级原恒星盘形成过程中，落入云团中的“前太阳系”富钙铝包体（CAI）颗粒几乎全部经历了升华和再凝结过程。

title: Filter Design for Estimating the Stellar Metallicity of Metal-poor Stars from Gaia XP Spectra
comment: Accepted for publication in The Astronomical Journal. 17 pages, 15 figures
summary: The estimation of stellar atmospheric parameters for large-scale samples, particularly metal-poor stars, is a cornerstone of Galactic archaeology. In this work, we optimized a photometric filter design tailored to measuring stellar metallicities for very metal-poor stars with [Fe/H]$< -1$.The optimal configurations consist of a central wavelength $λ_{\rm c}$ = 3960 Angstrom with a bandwidth $Δλ$ = 80 Angstrom for giant stars, and $λ_{\rm c} $= 3920 Angstrom with $Δλ$ = 80 Angstrom for dwarf stars. By applying these optimized filters to synthetic photometry derived from Gaia XP spectra, we inferred metallicities for both populations. Both internal and external validations demonstrate high precision across a wide metallicity range: 0.18-0.19 dex for $-2 \le \rm [Fe/H] \le -1$, 0.23-0.33 dex for $-3 \le \rm [Fe/H] \le -2$, and approximately 0.39 dex for the most metal-poor regime, successfully extending down to $\rm [Fe/H] \approx -4$ for giant stars, $\rm [Fe/H] \approx -3.3$ for dwarf stars. Finally, we present a catalog of approximately 14.5 million metal-poor stars with robust $\rm [Fe/H]$ measurements, along with more than ten thousand red giant ultra metal-poor candidates with $\rm [Fe/H] < -4.0$, providing a valuable resource for exploring the early formation and chemical evolution of the Milky Way.

AI.tldr: 通过优化中心波长和带宽分别为3960/80埃（巨星星）和3920/80埃（矮星星）的测光滤光片设计，从盖亚XP光谱合成测光中实现了对金属丰度[Fe/H]低至-4（巨星）和-3.3（矮星）的约1450万颗贫金属星的高精度金属丰度测量，并识别出超过一万颗[Fe/H]<-4的超贫金属红巨星候选体。
AI.background: 该研究的科学主题是利用优化的测光滤光片设计，从大样本恒星中精确测量贫金属星（metal-poor stars）的金属丰度，以服务于银河考古学。
AI.data: 研究使用盖亚（Gaia）探测器的XP光谱生成合成测光（synthetic photometry）作为数据来源。
AI.method: 采用优化的窄带测光滤光片设计（中心波长λ_c=3960埃/带宽Δλ=80埃用于巨星，λ_c=3920埃/带宽Δλ=80埃用于矮星），并应用于来自Gaia XP光谱的合成测光数据，通过光度测光方法推断恒星金属丰度（[Fe/H]）。
AI.result: 优化的测光滤光片配置对[Fe/H]<-1的极贫金属星实现了高精度金属丰度测量，巨星的精度可达[Fe/H]约-4，矮星约-3.3，并发布了约1450万颗贫金属星的星表及超万颗超贫金属红巨星候选体。

title: Constraining dark matter self-interaction from kinetic heating in neutron stars
summary: Dark matter search strategies have started advancing towards the neutrino fog. In this regard, compact objects such as neutron stars have already demonstrated their ability in probing such low DM-nucleon cross-sections from dark matter induced effects. In the optically thin limit, effect of dark matter self-interaction becomes relevant and may assist the capture and thermalization of dark matter inside stars, imparting observable changes on neutron star temperatures. The resulting radiation although weak can be potentially detected by the James Webb Space Telescope and upcoming Thirty Meter Telescope and the European Extremely Large Telescope. Observation of cold neutron stars accompanied by advancements in direct detection probes would provide stringent constraints or a smoking-gun signature for dark matter self-interactions. The potential detection of a neutron star with surface temperatures $\sim (1000 - 1200)$ K in the optically thin limit can push the bounds on asymmetric dark matter self-interaction cross-section to approximately two orders of magnitude more stringent than the bullet cluster.

AI.tldr: 核心贡献是研究了光学薄极限下中子星对暗物质自相互作用的捕获与热化效应，发现观测表面温度约为1000-1200 K的冷中子星可将非对称暗物质自相互作用截面的约束提升至比子弹星系团严格两个数量级。
AI.background: 暗物质搜索策略正朝着中微子雾区推进，并利用中子星等致密天体探测暗物质-核子低散射截面，其中暗物质自相互作用在光学薄极限下影响俘获与热化过程，可被詹姆斯·韦布空间望远镜及未来大型望远镜观测。
AI.data: 使用了中子星作为暗物质探测器，以及詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜、三十米望远镜和欧洲极大望远镜作为潜在观测数据来源。
AI.method: 在光学薄极限下，采用暗物质自相互作用的捕获与热化效应分析其对中子星温度的影响，并结合詹姆斯·韦布空间望远镜及未来三十米望远镜和欧洲极大望远镜的观测进行约束。
AI.result: 在光学薄极限下，暗物质自相互作用可促进中子星内部暗物质的俘获与热化，导致表面温度升至约1000-1200 K，从而将非对称暗物质自相互作用截面的约束推至比子弹星系团严格约两个数量级。

title: Gauging the Impact of Cosmic Ray Feedback on the Stellar Initial Mass Function
comment: 17 Pages, 9 Figures, published in ApJ. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2407.17597
summary: Cosmic rays (CRs) drive ionization and influence gas dynamics in molecular clouds (MCs), potentially impacting the resulting star formation outcomes. Although previous simulations of individual star formation have included methods for cosmic ray transport (CRT), none have been large enough to resolve the stellar initial mass function (IMF). We conduct numerical simulations following the collapse of a $20000 M_{\odot}$ MC and the subsequent star formation including CRT, both with and without CRs accelerated by winds from the young massive stars, and compare against a non-CRT simulation. We show that after the first massive stars form, the cavity produced by feedback is more pronounced in the CRT simulations because the external CRs are able to propagate inwards and compress the gas into higher density structures. This increases the subsequent star formation in the cloud; by the end of the simulation, the SFE in the CRT simulation including stellar wind CRs is 43 \% higher than the non-CRT simulation. The IMF is also top heavy in comparison, with a slope above 1 $M_{\odot}$ that is shallower by $\sim 20$ \%. These effects are also present in the simulation without wind-accelerated CRs, but they are not as pronounced; the SFE is only 16 \% higher than the non-CRT simulation, and the IMF high-mass slope is shallower by $\sim 10$ \%. These results may explain some of the observed top-heavy IMFs, which typically occur in high-CR environments such as the galactic center.

AI.tldr: 通过模拟包含宇宙线输运的20000倍太阳质量分子云塌缩和恒星形成，发现宇宙线输运显著增强了恒星形成效率（最高增加43%）并导致初始质量函数（IMF）在高质量端变平（斜率变缓约20%），尤其在包含恒星风加速宇宙线的情况下。
AI.background: 该研究探讨宇宙线（cosmic rays, CRs）驱动分子云电离并影响气体动力学，进而对恒星形成过程及初始质量函数（initial mass function, IMF）产生的潜在作用。
AI.data: 数据来源为对20000 M⊙分子云坍缩和后续恒星形成过程的数值模拟，包含有和无年轻大质量恒星风加速宇宙线的宇宙线输运（CRT）模拟，并与无CRT模拟进行对比。
AI.method: 采用磁流体动力学（MHD）数值模拟，结合宇宙线输运（CRT）模型，并包含由大质量恒星风加速的宇宙线源。
AI.result: 宇宙线传输模拟显著提升了分子云中的恒星形成效率，使包含恒星风宇宙线的模型相比无宇宙线传输模型高出43%，并导致初始质量函数（IMF）在高质量端变平约20%。

title: MINDS: Intertwined evolution of dust and gas in large planet-forming disks. A diversity driven by halted pebble drift?
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: (Abridged) We aim to investigate the inner regions of large and massive disks orbiting T Tauri stars, thought to be progenitors of systems with wide-orbit planets and possible cases of halted pebble drift. We analyze the MIRI spectra of three disks from the MINDS program: V1094 Sco, DL Tau, and IM Lup. The spectra reveal a striking diversity. V1094 Sco and DL Tau exhibit the highest C$_2$H$_2$/H$_2$O flux ratio in the MINDS sample of T Tauri disks. In V1094 Sco, even cold C$_4$H$_2$ is seen. In contrast, the IM Lup spectrum is dominated by O-bearing species. No one-to-one correspondence is found between the gas in the outer disk, as traced by the C$_2$H/C$^{18}$O flux ratio, and that of the inner disk as traced by the C$_2$H$_2$/H$_2$O flux ratio. To explain these results, we propose a scenario based on a toy model of halted pebble drift. We show that a volatile C/O ratio close to unity and low C and O abundances in inner disks arise only if: (1) ~95$\%$ of the icy grains are blocked in the outer disk, (2) the outer disk is chemically evolved, and (3) the gas in the outer disk has had time to reach the inner disk. DL Tau and perhaps V1094 Sco would be the rare examples for which all these conditions are met. Therefore, a high C$_2$H$_2$/H$_2$O flux ratio in pebble-rich disks would have a different origin than proposed for very-low mass stars, for which fast drift of O-rich pebbles would eventually leave a C-rich inner disk. We also show for the first time that the disks with high C$_2$H$_2$/H$_2$O flux ratio exhibit a prominent silica dust component, a result found in four disks published so far (V1094 Sco, DL Tau, CY Tau, DoAr 33). We propose that the reformation of dust at the sublimation front of silicates in a gas with super-solar (but below unity) C/O ratio leads to a silica stoichiometry (SiO$_2$). In turn, silica is a promising diagnostic of the C/O ratio in the inner disks.

AI.tldr: 分析MIRI光谱揭示T Tauri星周围大质量盘（如V1094 Sco和DL Tau）内区具有高C₂H₂/H₂O通量比和二氧化硅尘埃成分，提出该特征源于外部盘冰粒漂移受阻及化学演化导致内盘挥发物C/O比接近1且丰度降低，而非富氧冰粒快速漂移留下的富碳内盘。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索T Tauri星周围大质量大尺度盘的内区化学与尘埃组成，以理解宽轨道行星形成和卵石漂移受阻过程对盘内挥发性元素比（如C/O比）的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源于MINDS项目的MIRI光谱观测，包括V1094 Sco、DL Tau和IM Lup三个T Tauri星盘的谱线数据。
AI.method: 基于MIRI光谱分析发现高C₂H₂/H₂O通量比与显著硅质尘埃成分关联，提出停滞卵石漂移模型作为解释，该模型需满足约95% icy颗粒在外盘被阻挡、外盘化学演化充分、气体有足够时间抵达内盘，并假设硅酸盐升华前沿在超太阳但低于1的C/O比气体中重新形成尘埃导致二氧化硅化学计量比。
AI.result: 盘状星周盘（protoplanetary disk）内部的高乙炔/水分子（C₂H₂/H₂O）通量比与显著的硅石（silica）尘埃成分相关，且该现象的成因不同于极低质量恒星盘中富氧砾石快速漂移导致的富碳内盘模型。
